_publications._publicationTitle: The Combination of HSP90 Inhibitors and Selumetinib Reinforces the Inhibitory Effects on Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Meanwhile, the combinations exhibited mild inhibitory effects on non-tumor Schwann cell lines, ipnNF95.11c
details: Exhibited mild inhibitory effects when treated with selumetinib and HSP90i combinations, indicating selectivity for tumor cells over non-tumor Schwann cells
